name: Mentat
runtime_role: Live cognitive runtime substrate for agent sessions.

surface_projection.hooks: Claude/Codex/Gemini hook adapters over the same state loop
surface_projection.commands: Claude Code slash commands over Mentat CLI, skills, and subagents
surface_projection.mcp: local introspection server inside the Mentat package
surface_projection.monitors: entropy, drift, and archivist background lanes
surface_projection.evals: state-machine, routing, and persistence regression harness
surface_projection.skills: debrief, plan, dispatch, and reflect skill surfaces

latest_summary.command_frontmatter: PASS; 9 commands; scoped shell tools and argument hints checked
latest_summary.prompt_surfaces: PASS; 7 agent/helper prompts plus helper index; role, tool, boundary, and output contracts checked
latest_summary.privacy_boundary: PASS; release-candidate files only; smoke enforced
latest_summary.release_tree: PASS; 139 candidate files; 299 ignored local-only/forbidden files after cache cleanup

known_gaps: release archives should be rebuilt only after Daeron reviews the exact candidate copy list
notes: Mentat is not a hook pack. Hooks, commands, MCP, monitors, evals, skills, and agents are projections over the runtime substrate.
Mentat's nine slash command prompts are now covered by command-frontmatter lint.
Mentat's seven agent/helper prompt files and helper index are now covered by prompt-surface review.
Mentat's release tree validator now enforces a privacy boundary scanner and synthetic smoke test before public copyover.
Mentat's .mcp.json install-facing projection is preserved so plugin-provided MCP hydration survives marketplace refreshes.
Aeriadne catalogs Mentat but does not own Mentat's runtime state.
